description: You are a structural engineer debugging a custom Finite Element Analysis (FEA) script for 2D truss bridge design in the project 'truss_analyzer' located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/truss_analyzer. The solver is currently producing physically impossible results due to errors in the element formulation and global matrix assembly. Fix the mathematical and logic errors in 'truss/element.py' and 'truss/solver.py' so that all 12 tests pass. Do not modify the test files in 'tests/' or use external FEA libraries. Note that truss elements are circular bars defined by diameter.
